commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=967cc13cbdf3ee3e53b1fd86694c25beb57d813c)
commands.review_summary:
This PR makes `localModelLean` embedded runs synthesize structured Tool Search config when `tools.toolSearch` is unset, passes that runtime config through tool and client catalog construction, adds tests, and updates local-model docs.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +82, Docs +2. Total +116 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the compatibility change from source: current main resolves Tool Search only from `params.config`, while the PR injects a Tool Search config when `localModelLean` is enabled and `tools.toolSearch` is unset. The broader Windows/Ollama event-loop issue was not live-reproduced here.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to decide the canonical lean-catalog/default semantics and upgrade risk; this is not a safe automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(agents): compact lean local tool catalogs
target.body:
## Summary

- default `localModelLean` runs to structured Tool Search controls when the operator has not configured `tools.toolSearch`
- keep explicit Tool Search config authoritative, including `tools.toolSearch: false`
- document that lean mode now hides larger plugin/MCP/client catalogs behind `tool_search`, `tool_describe`, and `tool_call`

Refs https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot`: passed 2 shards / 68 tests after rebasing onto `origin/main` `b475de834a0`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`: passed
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`: passed
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`: passed
- AWS Crabbox changed gate: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --label lean-tool-search-rebased-check-changed --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` (`provider=aws`, `lease=cbx_11dc202d8ad5`, `slug=brisk-barnacle`, `run=run_d46fde00ed0e`, exit 0)
- GitHub PR checks on head `7bd90c608be2fa9a944e3741b4e399578dfa8a68`: latest poll reported no failed or running checks

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: smaller/local-model runs can keep large extra tool catalogs out of the direct prompt surface without disabling tools entirely.

Real environment tested: linked OpenClaw gwt worktree, AWS Crabbox Linux changed-gate proof, and GitHub PR checks on the pushed draft head.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: reran the focused lean-mode and embedded-attempt tests, formatter, lint, diff check, remote `pnpm check:changed`, and PR checks.

Evidence after fix: local targeted tests passed 2 Vitest shards / 68 tests; AWS changed gate selected `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs`, including core/core-test typecheck, full core lint, import-cycle checks, and guards; GitHub checks had no failures at latest poll.

Observed result after fix: lean-mode embedded runs enable Tool Search controls by default and pass the resolved Tool Search config into core, OpenClaw, MCP, and client catalog construction while preserving explicit operator config.

What was not tested: live Ollama model-family validation for the broader local-model issue.
target.author: vincentkoc
